backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that manages content sections, printable guides, and technicians with CRUD operations, includes blob storage mixin, and provides HTTP outcall functionality to fetch zip code boundary coordinates from a cloud function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix for overlapping issues between the 'Find local pest technicians' icon and headings in the LocationFinder component, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, hooks, and utilities including main app structure, educational content sections, pest-specific content, photo scanner, quiz, and location finder features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette defining CSS variables for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Bed Bug Educational App that loads the React application via main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ErrorBoundary, and conditionally renders either QrCodePage or main educational content with header/footer based on hash routing.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main educational content component with eight-tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp, locationFinder) and pest selection UI for 18 different pests, synchronized with hash-based routing.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with error details and a reset button to return to the main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution with heart icon, and educational disclaimer text.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with app branding (bug icon and title) and a Share button that opens the QR code share dialog.
frontend/src/components/LocationFinder.t: React component that integrates Google Maps API for location search with autocomplete, displays search results on an interactive map with markers and info windows.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Educational content component about army ants, covering identification, physical characteristics, species distribution, habitats, behavior, and safety warnings. Organized into cards with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Educational content component about household beetles, covering identification, common species, infestation signs, entry points, and attractants. Structured with cards and descriptive lists.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: React component displaying identification, habitat, and control information for black ants with cards covering physical characteristics, nesting locations, attractants, and prevention methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: React component providing identification and management guidance for black stink bugs, including physical traits, entry behavior, hiding spots, and removal techniques with emphasis on avoiding odor release.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component with detailed carpenter ant information including structural damage warnings, identification features (frass, rustling sounds), nesting habits, and professional treatment recommendations.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component covering cockroach identification by species (German, American, Oriental, Brown-Banded), signs of infestation (droppings, odor, egg cases), common hiding places, and control methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing common house fly characteristics, life cycle, breeding sources, attractants, and prevention strategies with focus on sanitation and exclusion methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component displaying comprehensive information about earwigs including identification, physical characteristics, behavior patterns, habitats, attractants, and prevention methods. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with lucide-react icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component providing detailed information about head lice including identification, signs, checking methods, transmission, risk factors, and treatment guidance. Emphasizes that head lice are not related to hygiene and uses shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component describing various large fly species (blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, horse flies) with identification details, physical characteristics, behaviors, and infestation signs. Includes health warnings about biting species and disease transmission.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component covering mouse identification, infestation signs (droppings, gnaw marks, nests), habitats, entry points, and health warnings. Emphasizes disease risks and structural damage potential with detailed prevention guidance.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component detailing clothes moths and pantry moths, including adult and larval identification, infestation signs, common locations, and damage patterns. Focuses on fabric and food storage protection strategies.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component displaying comprehensive information about red ants including identification, species types, nesting locations, and safety warnings about painful stings and allergic reactions.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: React component providing detailed scorpion information including physical characteristics, common North American species, habitats, nocturnal behavior patterns, and medical safety notices for stings.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: React component covering spider identification, common indoor species, web patterns, and dedicated section on dangerous black widow spiders with safety warnings about venomous bites.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: React component detailing tick life cycles, feeding behavior, disease transmission risks (Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever), outdoor exposure locations, and removal/prevention guidance.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: React component describing wood-boring beetles including powderpost and old house borers, damage signs (exit holes, frass), affected wood types, typical infestation locations, and structural damage warnings.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: React component for capturing or uploading pest photos with camera controls, image editing features (rotation, crop, zoom, enhance), and integration with saved scans gallery and persistence.
React component that displays and allows downloading of PDF guides filtered by content type, with loading states and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: React component that generates a QR code for the app URL with copy-to-clipboard and download functionality, including error handling and loading states.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: React component that displays a gallery of saved pest scans with filtering by tags, reordering, deletion with confirmation dialog, and date formatting.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: React component for managing tags on saved scans with inline editing, adding, and removing tags using badges and input fields with keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Displays educational content about bed bug habitats, including common hiding spots (mattresses, furniture, walls), feeding behavior (nocturnal, CO₂ detection), and reproduction lifecycle information with images and formatted text cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component that displays critical safety warnings before accessing heat treatment checklist, including ammunition removal, furniture disposal warnings, and occupancy restrictions with confirm/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Educational section showing how to identify bed bugs through visual guides of adult bugs, life stages (eggs, nymphs), bite marks, and physical evidence like fecal stains, presented in card layouts with images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Provides prevention guidance for avoiding bed bug infestations, covering travel precautions (hotel inspection, luggage handling) and used furniture inspection with detailed checklists and images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Interactive heat treatment checklist section with before/during/after phases, progress tracking via custom hooks, completion statistics, reset functionality, and safety reminder dialog integration.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Dialog component for sharing the app via QR code or link, with copy-to-clipboard and download functionality. Includes error handling, loading states, and a full-page QR view option.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: Component for searching pest control technicians by zip code, displaying results in a list or map view. Validates zip code input, fetches technician data and zip boundary coordinates, and formats location information.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianMap.ts: Google Maps component that displays technician locations as markers and optionally renders zip code boundary polygons. Manages map instance, markers, info windows, and bounds calculation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically recreating actors when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleMaps.ts: React hook that loads the Google Maps JavaScript API script with Places library, managing loading state and errors with singleton pattern to prevent duplicate script loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Custom hash-based routing hook that normalizes URL hashes, listens to hash changes, and provides navigation helpers without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Hook for managing heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality.
Hook that manages a first-visit reminder dialog for heat treatment checklist, persisting confirmation state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Hook providing image editing capabilities including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export functionality with async processing pipeline.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity delegation, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Hook that determines and navigates to the next route in a predefined sequence of application pages based on current hash route.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching printable guides, technicians by zip code, and zip code boundary coordinates from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Hook managing saved pest scanner images with localStorage persistence, supporting CRUD operations, ordering, and tagging functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette for light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/types/google-maps.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for Google Maps JavaScript API, including Map, Marker, InfoWindow, Polygon, LatLng, and Places service interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe guard utilities providing invariant assertions, exhaustive switch helpers, and safe value checking functions for runtime type narrowing.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard utility with modern API and fallback support, returning structured success/failure results for copying text to clipboard.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Image manipulation utilities providing rotate, enhance (contrast/brightness), zoom, and crop operations on image data URLs using canvas.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: QR code generation and download utilities using external API service, with safe download routine and user-facing error handling.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Safe localStorage wrapper with non-throwing operations (getItem, setItem, removeItem) and availability detection for quota/disabled scenarios.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions for computing shareable app URLs, providing both origin-only and full URL including hash for sharing and QR code generation.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook for safely running cleanup logic on component unmount, supporting both sync and async cleanup functions with error handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (using OKLCH), border radius, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request for overlapping issue between 'Find local pest technicians' icon and headings in LocationFinder component.
